info.name: Cloudsmith API (v1)
audit-log
Lists audit log entries for a specific namespace.

params.name: page
params.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of results to return per page.

params.name: query
params.description: A search term for querying events, actors, or timestamps of log records.

items.docs: Lists audit log entries for a specific namespace.

params.name: page
params.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of results to return per page.

params.name: query
params.description: A search term for querying events, actors, or timestamps of log records.

items.docs: Lists audit log entries for a specific repository.

info.name: badges
Get latest package version for a package or package group.

params.name: badge_token
params.description: Badge token to authenticate for private packages

params.name: cacheSeconds
params.description: Override the shields.io badge cacheSeconds value.

params.name: color
params.description: Override the shields.io badge color value.

params.name: label
params.description: Override the shields.io badge label value.

params.name: labelColor
params.description: Override the shields.io badge labelColor value.

params.name: logoColor
params.description: Override the shields.io badge logoColor value.

params.name: logoWidth
params.description: Override the shields.io badge logoWidth value.

params.name: render
params.description: If true, badge will be rendered

params.name: shields
params.description: If true, a shields response will be generated

params.name: show_latest
params.description: If true, for latest version badges a '(latest)' suffix is added

params.name: style
params.description: Override the shields.io badge style value.

items.docs: Get latest package version for a package or package group.

info.name: broadcasts
Create a broadcast token.

items.docs: Create a broadcast token.

info.name: bulk-action
bulk_action

items.docs: Perform bulk operations on multiple packages within a repository or across all accessible repositories. If 'repository' is provided, actions are limited to that repository. If 'repository' is omitted, actions are performed across all repositories the user has access to within the workspace. Returns a list of successfully actioned packages and any packages that failed with error details.

params.description: Number of results to return per page.

params.name: show_tokens
params.description: Show entitlement token strings in results

params.name: query
params.description: A search term for querying names of entitlements.

params.name: active
params.description: If true, only include active tokens

params.name: sort
params.description: A field for sorting objects in ascending or descending order. Use `-` prefix for descending order (e.g., `-name`). Available options: name.

info.name: metrics
View for listing entitlement token metrics, across an account.

params.name: page
params.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of results to return per page.

params.name: finish
params.description: Include metrics upto and including this UTC date or UTC datetime. For example '2020-12-31' or '2021-12-13T00:00:00Z'.

params.name: start
params.description: Include metrics from and including this UTC date or UTC datetime. For example '2020-12-31' or '2021-12-13T00:00:00Z'.

params.name: tokens
params.description: A comma seperated list of tokens (slug perm) to include in the results.

items.docs: View for listing entitlement token metrics, across an account.

info.name: Return a list of Package Groups in a repository.

params.name: page
params.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of results to return per page.

params.name: group_by
params.description: A field to group packages by. Available options: name, backend_kind.

params.name: hide_subcomponents
params.description: Whether to hide packages which are subcomponents of another package in the results

params.name: query
params.description: A search term for querying names, filenames, versions, distributions, architectures, formats, or statuses of packages.

params.name: sort
params.description: A field for sorting objects in ascending or descending order. Use `-` prefix for descending order (e.g., `-name`). Available options: name, count, num_downloads, size, last_push, backend_kind.

items.docs: Return a list of Package Groups in a repository.

items.docs: Retrieve all soft-deleted packages in the workspace. Optionally filter by repository using the 'repository' query parameter.

items.docs: Perform actions on soft-deleted packages in the recycle bin. Supported actions: permanently delete (hard delete), restore. Returns a list of successfully actioned packages and any packages that failed with error details.
